cards.name: Bash
cards.content:
Base: Deal 8 damage. Apply 2 Vulnerable .
Upgrade: Deal 10 damage. Apply 3 Vulnerable .
cards.pick_advice_zh: 起手自带：主要负责前期挂易伤；通常不想再补第二张，后期更希望它被更高质量前置替代。

cards.name: Defend (Ironclad)
cards.content:
Base: Gain 5 Block .
Upgrade: Gain 8 Block .
cards.pick_advice_zh: 起手自带：过渡用防御，不建议主动再抓；后面更想要能抽牌、消耗或高数值的防御牌。

cards.name: Strike (Ironclad)
cards.content:
Base: Deal 6 damage.
Upgrade: Deal 9 damage.
cards.pick_advice_zh: 起手自带：纯过渡伤害，不建议主动再抓；正常路线里应尽快被更高质量攻击替换。

cards.name: Anger
cards.content:
Base: Deal 6 damage. Add a copy of this card into your Discard Pile.
Upgrade: Deal 8 damage. Add a copy of this card into your Discard Pile.
cards.pick_advice_zh: 前期过渡：低费补伤害和补攻击频率都不错；后期容易加厚牌堆，通常只拿一张甚至直接停手。

cards.name: Armaments
cards.content:
Base: Gain 5 Block . Upgrade a card in your Hand.
Upgrade: Gain 5 Block . Upgrade ALL cards in your Hand.
cards.pick_advice_zh: 前期过渡：数值和升级质量都够用，能帮你平稳穿过前中期；后期若已不缺升级目标就少抓。

cards.name: Blood Wall
cards.content:
Base: Lose 2 HP. Gain 16 Block .
Upgrade: Lose 2 HP. Gain 20 Block .
cards.pick_advice_zh: 前期过渡：高数值防御很适合顶前期；有自残收益时更值，纯慢速控制通常也只拿一张。

cards.name: Bloodletting
cards.content: Lose 3 HP. Gain .
cards.pick_advice_zh: 循环件：在血量充足的小牌堆里是稳定回费件，也能作为启动更快打出核心；血线紧张时别贪。

cards.name: Body Slam
cards.content: Deal damage equal to your Block .
cards.pick_advice_zh: 终端：有壁垒、巩固、坚定不移或高密度格挡时就是低资源压力收尾；没 Block 壳子先别拿。

cards.name: Breakthrough
cards.content:
Base: Lose 1 HP. Deal 9 damage to ALL enemies.
Upgrade: Lose 1 HP. Deal 13 damage to ALL enemies.
cards.pick_advice_zh: 前期过渡：缺 AOE 时可以拿来过多怪房，自残体系里也不完全亏；后期通常不是保留件。

cards.name: Cinder
cards.content:
Base: Deal 17 damage. Exhaust the top card of your Draw Pile.
Upgrade: Deal 22 damage. Exhaust the top card of your Draw Pile.
cards.pick_advice_zh: 通常不抓：直伤和消耗都不够高，前期不够顶，后期也不进循环；除非只是临时缺一张补刀。

cards.name: Havoc
cards.content: Play the top card of your Draw Pile and Exhaust it.
cards.pick_advice_zh: 启动件：能加速把高价值牌打出去或顺手触发消耗；牌堆太杂时波动很大，不宜早拿太多。

cards.name: Headbutt
cards.content:
Base: Deal 9 damage. Put a card from your Discard Pile on top of your Draw Pile.
Upgrade: Deal 12 damage. Put a card from your Discard Pile on top of your Draw Pile.
cards.pick_advice_zh: 前期过渡：数值合格，还能回捞痛击或关键牌；大多数局拿一张都很稳。

cards.name: Iron Wave
cards.content:
Base: Gain 5 Block . Deal 5 damage.
Upgrade: Gain 7 Block . Deal 7 damage.
cards.pick_advice_zh: 通常不抓：看似攻防一体，但数值偏低，前后期都不够突出；除非开局特别缺平滑过渡。

cards.name: Molten Fist
cards.content:
Base: Deal 10 damage. Double the enemy's Vulnerable . Exhaust .
Upgrade: Deal 14 damage. Double the enemy's Vulnerable . Exhaust .
cards.pick_advice_zh: 前期过渡：已有稳定易伤时伤害会很可观；没有易伤壳子时偏笨，一般不想拿第二张。

cards.name: Perfected Strike
cards.content:
Base: Deal 6 damage. Deals 2 additional damage for ALL your cards containing “Strike”.
Upgrade: Deal 6 damage. Deals 3 additional damage for ALL your cards containing “Strike”.
cards.pick_advice_zh: 通常不抓：它会逼你保留低质量 Strike，和做薄牌堆方向相反；只有专门打击包才会碰。

cards.name: Pommel Strike
cards.content:
Base: Deal 9 damage. Draw 1 card.
Upgrade: Deal 10 damage. Draw 2 cards.
cards.pick_advice_zh: 循环件：单回合可反复提供抽牌，前中后期都实用；想做小循环时优先级一直很高。

cards.name: Setup Strike
cards.content:
Base: Deal 7 damage. Gain 2 Strength this turn.
Upgrade: Deal 9 damage. Gain 3 Strength this turn.
cards.pick_advice_zh: 通常不抓：前期伤害不够拔尖，后期也不进核心循环；多数局都只是稀释。

cards.name: Shrug It Off
cards.content:
Base: Gain 8 Block . Draw 1 card.
Upgrade: Gain 11 Block . Draw 1 card.
cards.pick_advice_zh: 循环件：能反复补格挡和抽牌，是最稳定的小牌堆支点之一；几乎任何时期都能拿。

cards.name: Sword Boomerang
cards.content:
Base: Deal 3 damage to a random enemy 3 times.
Upgrade: Deal 3 damage to a random enemy 4 times.
cards.pick_advice_zh: 前期过渡：有力量时会明显变强，没有力量时只是一般补伤害；普通局不要太早囤多张。

cards.name: Thunderclap
cards.content:
Base: Deal 4 damage and apply 1 Vulnerable to ALL enemies.
Upgrade: Deal 7 damage and apply 1 Vulnerable to ALL enemies.
cards.pick_advice_zh: 前期过渡：前期很重要的群体易伤和轻 AOE，能显著改善多怪房；有凶恶时价值更高。

cards.name: Tremble
cards.content:
Base: Apply 2 Vulnerable .
Upgrade: Apply 3 Vulnerable .
cards.pick_advice_zh: 前期过渡：单体挂易伤能帮你过精英和 Boss；若已有稳定易伤来源，就不必继续补。

cards.name: True Grit
cards.content:
Base: Gain 7 Block . Exhaust 1 card at random.
Upgrade: Gain 9 Block . Exhaust 1 card .
cards.pick_advice_zh: 启动件：能烧掉低质量牌并顺手补防，是很好的成型加速器；升级后会稳定很多。

cards.name: Twin Strike
cards.content:
Base: Deal 5 damage twice.
Upgrade: Deal 7 damage twice.
cards.pick_advice_zh: 通常不抓：前期不如更强的过渡伤害牌，后期也不进循环；有力量时能用，但一般仍不优先。

cards.name: Ashen Strike
cards.content:
Base: Deal 6 damage. Deals 3 additional damage for each card in your Exhaust Pile.
Upgrade: Deal 6 damage. Deals 4 additional damage for each card in your Exhaust Pile.
cards.pick_advice_zh: 终端：有稳定消耗后会快速长成高伤害收尾，没有消耗壳子时别把它当核心抓。

cards.name: Battle Trance
cards.content:
Base: Draw 3 cards. You cannot draw additional cards this turn.
Upgrade: Draw 4 cards. You cannot draw additional cards this turn.
cards.pick_advice_zh: 启动件：高质量爆发抽牌，强在更早摸到核心；但会锁本回合后续抽牌，不能当真循环件。

cards.name: Bludgeon
cards.content:
Base: Deal 32 damage.
Upgrade: Deal 42 damage.
cards.pick_advice_zh: 前期过渡：打精英和 Boss 的爆发很实在；中后期曲线太重时通常不想继续补。

cards.name: Bully
cards.content:
Base: Deal 4 damage. Deals 2 additional damage for each Vulnerable on the enemy.
Upgrade: Deal 4 damage. Deals 3 additional damage for each Vulnerable on the enemy.
cards.pick_advice_zh: 前期过渡：有稳定易伤时可作为高效单体伤害过渡；没易伤壳子时通常不抓。

cards.name: Burning Pact
cards.content:
Base: Exhaust 1 card. Draw 2 cards.
Upgrade: Exhaust 1 card. Draw 3 cards.
cards.pick_advice_zh: 启动件：既能烧废牌又能补抽，是最好的成型加速器之一；前中期拿到通常都不亏。

cards.name: Demonic Shield
cards.content:
Base: Lose 1 HP. Give another player Block equal to your Block . Exhaust .
Upgrade: Lose 1 HP. Give another player Block equal to your Block .
cards.pick_advice_zh: 通常不抓：明显偏联机保护牌，单人里大多只是低效稀释。

cards.name: Dismantle
cards.content:
Base: Deal 8 damage. If the enemy is Vulnerable , hits twice.
Upgrade: Deal 10 damage. If the enemy is Vulnerable , hits twice.
cards.pick_advice_zh: 前期过渡：有稳定易伤时能作为很好的单体爆发过渡；没有易伤支持时不建议碰。

cards.name: Dominate
cards.content:
Base: Gain 1 Strength for each Vulnerable on the enemy. Exhaust .
Upgrade: Gain 1 Strength for each Vulnerable on the enemy.
cards.pick_advice_zh: 通常不抓：需要高层易伤才值，平时太吃条件；多数局不如直接拿更稳的过渡牌。

cards.name: Drum of Battle
cards.content:
Base: Draw 2 cards. At the start of your turn, Exhaust the top card of your Draw Pile.
Upgrade: Draw 3 cards. At the start of your turn, Exhaust the top card of your Draw Pile.
cards.pick_advice_zh: 通常不抓：太不稳定，容易磨掉关键牌；除非你明确接受高波动，否则一般直接跳过。

cards.name: Evil Eye
cards.content:
Base: Gain 8 Block . Gain another 8 Block if you have Exhausted a card this turn.
Upgrade: Gain 11 Block . Gain another 11 Block if you have Exhausted a card this turn.
cards.pick_advice_zh: 前期过渡：有稳定消耗时是不错的防御过渡；没有触发条件时偏弱，不宜早抓。

cards.name: Expect a Fight
cards.content: Gain for each Attack in your Hand.
cards.pick_advice_zh: 循环件：攻击密度够高时可反复把手牌转成能量，是条件回费件；技能偏多的牌组就别拿。

cards.name: Feel No Pain
cards.content:
Base: Whenever a card is Exhausted , gain 3 Block .
Upgrade: Whenever a card is Exhausted , gain 4 Block .
cards.pick_advice_zh: 终端：不是循环件本身，但一旦循环里持续有消耗，它会把防御滚得很快；前期裸拿偏弱。

cards.name: Fight Me!
cards.content:
Base: Deal 5 damage twice. Gain 2 Strength . The enemy gains 1 Strength .
Upgrade: Deal 6 damage twice. Gain 3 Strength . The enemy gains 1 Strength .
cards.pick_advice_zh: 通常不抓：敌人加力的副作用很容易让你前台崩掉，收益又不够稳定。

cards.name: Flame Barrier
cards.content:
Base: Gain 12 Block . Whenever you are attacked this turn, deal 4 damage back.
Upgrade: Gain 16 Block . Whenever you are attacked this turn, deal 6 damage back.
cards.pick_advice_zh: 前期过渡：数值和反伤都很实用，打多段敌人尤其强；多数局拿一张很稳。

cards.name: Forgotten Ritual
cards.content:
Base: If you Exhausted a card this turn, gain .
Upgrade: If you Exhausted a card this turn, gain 4 .
cards.pick_advice_zh: 循环件：只要本回合先触发过消耗，就能反复提供回费；没有稳定消耗前置时先别急着抓。

cards.name: Grapple
cards.content:
Base: Deal 7 damage. Whenever you gain Block this turn, deal 5 damage to the enemy.
Upgrade: Deal 9 damage. Whenever you gain Block this turn, deal 7 damage to the enemy.
cards.pick_advice_zh: 通常不抓：要求你先堆 Block，回报却不够高，前期和后期都偏尴尬。

cards.name: Hemokinesis
cards.content:
Base: Lose 2 HP. Deal 14 damage.
Upgrade: Lose 2 HP. Deal 19 damage.
cards.pick_advice_zh: 前期过渡：高伤害非常适合抢前台和打精英；自残体系里还能顺手吃联动。

cards.name: Howl from Beyond
cards.content:
Base: Deal 16 damage to ALL enemies. At the start of your turn, plays from the Exhaust Pile.
Upgrade: Deal 21 damage to ALL enemies. At the start of your turn, plays from the Exhaust Pile.
cards.pick_advice_zh: 通常不抓：高费又不够稳定，作为 AOE 过渡偏劣；除非你已经有明确消耗壳子。

cards.name: Infernal Blade
cards.content: Add a random Attack into your Hand. It's free to play this turn. Exhaust .
cards.pick_advice_zh: 启动件：能临时补伤害并加快回合展开；有消耗收益时更值，但随机性不适合堆太多。

cards.name: Inferno
cards.content:
Base: At the start of your turn, lose 1 HP. Whenever you lose HP on your turn, deal 6 damage to ALL enemies.
Upgrade: At the start of your turn, lose 1 HP. Whenever you lose HP on your turn, deal 9 damage to ALL enemies.
cards.pick_advice_zh: 前期过渡：高质量 AOE 过渡牌，自残体系里还会继续变强；多数局都值得比一般群伤更高看。

cards.name: Inflame
cards.content:
Base: Gain 2 Strength .
Upgrade: Gain 3 Strength .
cards.pick_advice_zh: 前期过渡：力量的最稳起点之一，能直接提升前中期输出；有多段攻击时优先级更高。

cards.name: Juggling
cards.content:
Base: Add a copy of the third Attack you play each turn into your Hand.
Upgrade: Innate . Add a copy of the third Attack you play each turn into your Hand.
cards.pick_advice_zh: 通常不抓：触发条件太挑，数值也不够高；多数局会拖慢而不是帮助成型。

cards.name: Pillage
cards.content:
Base: Deal 6 damage. Draw cards until you draw a non-Attack card.
Upgrade: Deal 9 damage. Draw cards until you draw a non-Attack card.
cards.pick_advice_zh: 启动件：攻击密度够高时能快速继续摸牌找核心；技能偏多时就没那么值。

cards.name: Rage
cards.content:
Base: Whenever you play an Attack this turn, gain 3 Block .
Upgrade: Whenever you play an Attack this turn, gain 5 Block .
cards.pick_advice_zh: 终端：低资源压力的防御终端，攻击链和小循环都能把它放大；前期裸拿不一定强。

cards.name: Rampage
cards.content:
Base: Deal 9 damage. Increase this card's damage by 5 this combat.
Upgrade: Deal 9 damage. Increase this card's damage by 9 this combat.
cards.pick_advice_zh: 通常不抓：它要求你围绕单卡慢养，通常不如直接做小循环或拿更强过渡牌。

cards.name: Rupture
cards.content:
Base: Whenever you lose HP on your turn, gain 1 Strength .
Upgrade: Whenever you lose HP on your turn, gain 2 Strength .
cards.pick_advice_zh: 终端：有稳定自残后会滚出高成长力量，是典型成长终端；没触发器时先别碰。

cards.name: Second Wind
cards.content:
Base: Exhaust all non-Attack cards in your Hand. Gain 5 Block for each card Exhausted .
Upgrade: Exhaust all non-Attack cards in your Hand. Gain 7 Block for each card Exhausted .
cards.pick_advice_zh: 启动件：能一口气烧手牌并提供大量防御，是消耗成型的强启动牌；手里技能少时会变弱。

cards.name: Spite
cards.content:
Base: Deal 6 damage. If you lost HP this turn, draw 1 card.
Upgrade: Deal 9 damage. If you lost HP this turn, draw 1 card.
cards.pick_advice_zh: 启动件：自残体系里能补伤害也能补抽；普通局里通常只是一般过渡，不必高抓。

cards.name: Stampede
cards.content: At the end of your turn, 1 random Attack in your Hand is played against a random enemy.
cards.pick_advice_zh: 前期过渡：免费补出攻击很适合前中期抢节奏；后期若攻击密度不够，价值会明显下降。

cards.name: Stomp
cards.content:
Base: Deal 12 damage to ALL enemies. Costs 1 less for each Attack played this turn.
Upgrade: Deal 15 damage to ALL enemies. Costs 1 less for each Attack played this turn.
cards.pick_advice_zh: 前期过渡：攻击链里的 AOE 过渡，清多怪能力合格；但后期一般不当终端看。

cards.name: Stone Armor
cards.content:
Base: Gain 4 Plating .
Upgrade: Gain 6 Plating .
cards.pick_advice_zh: 通常不抓：数值不够高，前期不如直接拿更厚的防御，后期也不进核心结构。

cards.name: Taunt
cards.content:
Base: Gain 7 Block . Apply 1 Vulnerable .
Upgrade: Gain 8 Block . Apply 2 Vulnerable .
cards.pick_advice_zh: 前期过渡：格挡加易伤都很实在，是很稳的前中期功能牌；有凶恶时会更值。

cards.name: Unrelenting
cards.content:
Base: Deal 12 damage. The next Attack you play costs 0 .
Upgrade: Deal 18 damage. The next Attack you play costs 0 .
cards.pick_advice_zh: 通常不抓：看起来能连招，但单卡回报偏低；多数局不如直接拿更强过渡或更稳启动。

cards.name: Uppercut
cards.content:
Base: Deal 13 damage. Apply 1 Weak . Apply 1 Vulnerable .
Upgrade: Deal 13 damage. Apply 2 Weak . Apply 2 Vulnerable .
cards.pick_advice_zh: 前期过渡：对精英和 Boss 都很好的功能过渡，弱化加易伤都很值；通常一张就够。

cards.name: Vicious
cards.content:
Base: Whenever you apply Vulnerable , draw 1 card.
Upgrade: Whenever you apply Vulnerable , draw 2 cards.
cards.pick_advice_zh: 循环件：有稳定易伤来源时能反复把挂易伤转成抽牌，是条件抽牌件；没易伤壳子就别抓。

cards.name: Whirlwind
cards.content:
Base: Deal 5 damage to ALL enemies X times.
Upgrade: Deal 8 damage to ALL enemies X times.
cards.pick_advice_zh: 前期过渡：前期最强的 AOE 之一，后面有力量和加费时也依然能用；通常值得较早拿。

cards.name: Aggression
cards.content:
Base: At the start of your turn, put a random Attack from your Discard Pile into your Hand and Upgrade it.
Upgrade: Innate . At the start of your turn, put a random Attack from your Discard Pile into your Hand and Upgrade it.
cards.pick_advice_zh: 前期过渡：前中期回手并升级攻击的即时战力很强；后期若攻击池太杂，价值才会下降。

cards.name: Barricade
cards.content: Block is not removed at the start of your turn.
cards.pick_advice_zh: 终端：高成长防御终端，小循环一旦能持续起防，它会把战斗锁死；前期没格挡底盘时偏慢。

cards.name: Brand
cards.content:
Base: Lose 1 HP. Exhaust 1 card. Gain 1 Strength .
Upgrade: Lose 1 HP. Exhaust 1 card. Gain 2 Strength .
cards.pick_advice_zh: 启动件：既触发自残又顺手烧牌，能帮助更快进入成型回合；有撕裂或消耗壳子时更强。

cards.name: Cascade
cards.content:
Base: Play the top X cards of your Draw Pile.
Upgrade: Play the top X+1 cards of your Draw Pile.
cards.pick_advice_zh: 启动件：牌堆质量高时能一口气展开回合；前期牌组太杂时波动偏大。

cards.name: Colossus
cards.content:
Base: Gain 5 Block . You receive 50% less damage from Vulnerable enemies this turn.
Upgrade: Gain 8 Block . You receive 50% less damage from Vulnerable enemies this turn.
cards.pick_advice_zh: 前期过渡：数值足够，打易伤敌人时收益更高；可以当厚实的中期防御牌看。

cards.name: Conflagration
cards.content:
Base: Deal 8 damage to ALL enemies. Deals 2 additional damage for each other Attack you've played this turn.
Upgrade: Deal 9 damage to ALL enemies. Deals 3 additional damage for each other Attack you've played this turn.
cards.pick_advice_zh: 前期过渡：高质量 AOE 过渡牌，清多怪能力够强；但缺成长性，通常不把它当终端。

cards.name: Crimson Mantle
cards.content:
Base: At the start of your turn, lose 1 HP and gain 8 Block .
Upgrade: At the start of your turn, lose 1 HP and gain 10 Block .
cards.pick_advice_zh: 前期过渡：数值足够高，自残副作用在 Ironclad 身上也能接受；多数局都能当不错的过渡牌。

cards.name: Cruelty
cards.content:
Base: Vulnerable enemies take an additional 25% damage.
Upgrade: Vulnerable enemies take an additional 50% damage.
cards.pick_advice_zh: 终端：有稳定易伤时是高成长伤害终端；前期单拿很弱，通常等壳子成形再抓。

cards.name: Dark Embrace
cards.content: Whenever a card is Exhausted , draw 1 card.
cards.pick_advice_zh: 启动件：它能把消耗体系真正点亮，但自己不是循环件本体；看到腐化或大量消耗牌后优先级很高。

cards.name: Demon Form
cards.content:
Base: At the start of your turn, gain 2 Strength .
Upgrade: At the start of your turn, gain 3 Strength .
cards.pick_advice_zh: 启动件：力量体系的主要启动按钮，打长线和 Boss 很强；前期防守不够时不要过早全押。

cards.name: Feed
cards.content:
Base: Deal 10 damage. If Fatal , raise your Max HP by 3. Exhaust .
Upgrade: Deal 12 damage. If Fatal , raise your Max HP by 4. Exhaust .
cards.pick_advice_zh: 前期过渡：越早拿越值，能把整局容错慢慢滚高；只要你能稳定补刀，就值得抓。

cards.name: Fiend Fire
cards.content:
Base: Exhaust your Hand. Deal 7 damage for each card Exhausted . Exhaust .
Upgrade: Exhaust your Hand. Deal 10 damage for each card Exhausted . Exhaust .
cards.pick_advice_zh: 启动件：它不是终端而是烧牌启动，能快速清掉废牌并把牌堆压薄；有黑暗之拥时尤其强。

cards.name: Hellraiser
cards.content: Whenever you draw a card containing “Strike”, it is played against a random enemy.
cards.pick_advice_zh: 启动件：只有在你保留较多 Strike 或相关联动时才像样；普通薄牌堆路线通常不抓。

cards.name: Impervious
cards.content:
Base: Gain 30 Block . Exhaust .
Upgrade: Gain 40 Block . Exhaust .
cards.pick_advice_zh: 前期过渡：单卡数值非常够，能直接顶住危险回合；后期也能继续服务壁垒或全身撞击。

cards.name: Juggernaut
cards.content:
Base: Whenever you gain Block , deal 5 damage to a random enemy.
Upgrade: Whenever you gain Block , deal 7 damage to a random enemy.
cards.pick_advice_zh: 通常不抓：数值太低，启动慢，很多局不如直接拿更厚实的过渡或更快的终端。

cards.name: Mangle
cards.content:
Base: Deal 15 damage. Enemy loses 10 Strength this turn.
Upgrade: Deal 20 damage. Enemy loses 15 Strength this turn.
cards.pick_advice_zh: 前期过渡：单卡质量不错，能压敌方高攻回合；通常当功能过渡拿一张即可。

cards.name: Offering
cards.content:
Base: Lose 6 HP. Gain . Draw 3 cards. Exhaust .
Upgrade: Lose 6 HP. Gain . Draw 5 cards. Exhaust .
cards.pick_advice_zh: 启动件：顶级爆发启动，强在瞬间补费补抽并提前展开核心；它不是循环件，但几乎总是值得拿。

cards.name: One-Two Punch
cards.content:
Base: This turn, your next Attack is played an extra time.
Upgrade: This turn, your next 2 Attacks are played an extra time.
cards.pick_advice_zh: 通常不抓：太依赖上限回合，单卡本身不值；多数局会比看起来更拖。

cards.name: Pact's End
cards.content:
Base: Can only be played if you have 3 or more cards in your Exhaust Pile. Deal 17 damage to ALL enemies.
Upgrade: Can only be played if you have 3 or more cards in your Exhaust Pile. Deal 23 damage to ALL enemies.
cards.pick_advice_zh: 终端：有稳定消耗后能作为很强的成长 AOE 终端；消耗不够快时就不要太早投资。

cards.name: Primal Force
cards.content:
Base: Transform all Attacks in your Hand into Giant Rock .
Upgrade: Transform all Attacks in your Hand into Giant Rock+ .
cards.pick_advice_zh: 前期过渡：能把低质量攻击临时变成高面板，是有波动但可用的过渡牌；后期通常不留。

cards.name: Pyre
cards.content: Gain at the start of each turn.
cards.pick_advice_zh: 启动件：长期加费很适合把大牌和核心更早打出来；更像展开工具，不是循环本体。

cards.name: Stoke
cards.content: Exhaust your Hand. Draw a card for each card Exhausted . Exhaust .
cards.pick_advice_zh: 启动件：一口气烧手牌并重抽，非常适合加速成型和爆发回合；但它本身不能进入循环。

cards.name: Tank
cards.content: Take double damage from enemies. Allies take half damage from enemies.
cards.pick_advice_zh: 通常不抓：单人里副作用太重，收益又不稳定；基本只在联机分伤时才考虑。

cards.name: Tear Asunder
cards.content:
Base: Deal 5 damage. Hits an additional time for each time you lost HP this combat.
Upgrade: Deal 7 damage. Hits an additional time for each time you lost HP this combat.
cards.pick_advice_zh: 终端：有稳定掉血后成长很快，是自残路线的主要伤害终端之一；没自残壳子时别早抓。

cards.name: Thrash
cards.content:
Base: Deal 4 damage twice. Exhaust a random Attack in your Hand and add its damage to this card.
Upgrade: Deal 6 damage twice. Exhaust a random Attack in your Hand and add its damage to this card.
cards.pick_advice_zh: 终端：会随着吃掉的攻击成长，是可用的成长终端；但前期比较笨重，不要太早押。

cards.name: Unmovable
cards.content: The first time you gain Block from a card each turn, double the amount gained.
cards.pick_advice_zh: 前期过渡：单卡数值已经够强，前中期拿来保命很稳；后面也能自然接到 Block 终端结构里。

cards.name: Break
cards.content:
Base: Deal 20 damage. Apply 5 Vulnerable .
Upgrade: Deal 25 damage. Apply 7 Vulnerable .
cards.pick_advice_zh: 终端：高费但能一次拉高输出窗口，适合拿来收 Boss 或放大后续爆发；前期通常不强。

cards.name: Corruption
cards.content: Skills cost 0 . Whenever you play a Skill, Exhaust it.
cards.pick_advice_zh: 启动件：消耗体系最强启动按钮之一，落地后整副牌都会换挡；看到它通常就该往成型方向靠。

cards.name: Clash
cards.content:
Base: Can only be played if every card in your Hand is an Attack. Deal 14 damage.
Upgrade: Can only be played if every card in your Hand is an Attack. Deal 18 damage.
cards.pick_advice_zh: 通常不抓：和 Ironclad 常见的技能、状态、消耗结构天然冲突，几乎总是拖后腿。

cards.name: Dual Wield
cards.content:

Upgrade: Choose an Attack or Power card. Add 2 copies of that card into your Hand.
cards.pick_advice_zh: 通常不抓：太依赖已经有高质量目标，多数时候只是空转；没有明确复制对象就直接跳过。

cards.name: Entrench
cards.content: Double your Block .
cards.pick_advice_zh: 终端：只有在你已经能稳定堆高 Block 时才是高成长终端；前期单拿基本没用。
